parityMeta.describes: Real export redacted reference — pointer wrapper around the existing redacted real export. Drives the full pipeline (privacy guard pass, Data Health scan, CleanAppDataView build, TrainingDecision run) so the Swift port can prove end-to-end behaviour against a non-synthetic AppData without iOS-0 duplicating any real-user payload.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: The pointer is intentional. The redacted file is large (~805 KB) and already lives under tests/fixtures/data-health/ — duplicating it into the parity tree would double the diff cost on every PR. The Swift parity runner loads the same path.

pointer.privacyProvenance: Already redacted by the original fixture authoring; iOS-0 does not introduce additional copies. The privacy guard re-validates the pointer wrapper for any residual PII fields.
